summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: State
Good
Recovery 73 • Sleep 75 • Strain 39%

Read
Sleep came in deeper last night, yet recovery sits only moderate and reserves aren't fully restored. Output so far is light and the morning's protein start is solid, though the day still leans well under fuel with most of the protein left to close. A measured day, one that favors steady fueling over a widening gap.

Mind the deficit.

Performance: Mind the deficit.
